name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Diamond Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
+30 to Intelligence
+42% to Chaos Resistance
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

explicitMods: +102 to Accuracy Rating
+288% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier

flavourText: "Marylene stroked the medallion at her breast
before every duel and every cast of the die."
- Victario, the People's Poet

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports aura skills that reserve life or mana to create auras around you.

Supported Skills have no Reservation

Supported Skills also count as Blessing Skills
You can only have one Aura on you from your Blessing Skills
Your Non-Blessing Skills which Reserve Mana are Disabled while you have an Aura from a Supported Skill on you

implicitMods: 30% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
explicitMods: 7% increased Attack Speed
+94 to maximum Life

can only create more nothingness.

properties.name: Attack, Projectile, AoE, Melee, Strike, Fire

socketedItems.secDescrText: Infuses your two-handed melee weapon with molten energies to attack with physical and fire damage. This attack causes balls of molten magma to launch forth from the enemies you hit, divided amongst all enemies hit by the strike. These will deal area attack damage to enemies where they land. Every fifth time you attack with this skill it fires more, high-damage projectiles.
explicitMods: Fires 3 Projectiles
60% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
Projectiles deal 60% less Damage with Hits and Ailments
Every fifth Attack fires 5 additional Projectiles
Every fifth Attack, Projectiles deal 800% more Damage with Hits and Ailments

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports melee attack skills, making them repeat three times when used, targeting a random enemy each time. Cannot support Vaal skills, channelling skills, travel skills, retaliation skills or triggered skills.

Supported Skills have 50% more Melee Attack Speed
Supported Skills deal 20% less Attack Damage
Supported Skills deal 11% increased Melee Damage

Third Repeat of Supported Skills deals 66% more Damage

flavourText: Zana watched in awe as her father spoke. With each word,
he seemed to grow larger and more frightening, drawing
increasingly fervorous responses from his rapt audience.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. Your life cannot be raised above low life other than by flasks, and while above low life, skills will cost life as well as mana.
explicitMods:
Life Recovery other than Flasks cannot Recover Life to above Low Life
When taking Damage from Hits, 40% of Life loss below half Life is Prevented, then 75% of Life loss prevented this way is lost over 4 seconds
Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to 40% of Base Mana Cost while not on Low Life
